name: Transform
description: Transform capabilities for data manipulation, filtering, sorting, and JSON operations

capabilities.name: extract
capabilities.description: Extract property values from an array of objects based on a property path

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The array of objects to extract property values from

inputs.name: property_path
inputs.description: The property path to extract from each item (JSONPath syntax)

fields.name: values
fields.description: Array of extracted property values

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of values extracted

capabilities.name: get_value_by_path
capabilities.description: Get a value from an object using a JSONPath-like property path

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The object to extract a property value from

inputs.name: property_path
inputs.description: The property path to extract (JSONPath syntax)

capabilities.name: set_value_by_path
capabilities.description: Set a value in an object at a specified JSONPath-like property path

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: The object to set a property value in

inputs.name: property_path
inputs.description: The property path to set (JSONPath syntax, creates nested objects if needed)

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value to set at the property path

capabilities.name: filter_non_values
capabilities.description: Filter an array removing elements with null, empty, blank, or zero values

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The array of items to filter

inputs.name: property_path
inputs.description: The property path to check in each item (if omitted, checks the item itself)

inputs.name: filter_empty_strings
inputs.description: Remove items where the value is an empty string ("")

inputs.name: filter_null_values
inputs.description: Remove items where the value is null

inputs.name: filter_blank_strings
inputs.description: Remove items where the value is a whitespace-only string

inputs.name: filter_zero_values
inputs.description: Remove items where the value is 0 or "0"

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of items that passed the filter

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of items that passed the filter

fields.name: removed_count
fields.description: Number of items removed by the filter

capabilities.name: select_first
capabilities.description: Select the first truthy value from an array (skips null, empty, zero, false)

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The array to select the first truthy value from (skips null, empty strings, 0, false)

capabilities.name: coalesce
capabilities.description: Return the first non-null value from an array of values

inputs.name: values
inputs.description: Array of values to check; returns the first non-null/non-undefined value

inputs.name: treat_empty_string_as_null
inputs.description: If true, empty strings are treated as null and skipped

inputs.name: treat_zero_as_null
inputs.description: If true, zero values (0, 0.0) are treated as null and skipped

capabilities.name: from_json_string
capabilities.description: Parse a JSON string into a structured value

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The JSON string to parse into a value

capabilities.name: to_json_string
capabilities.description: Convert a value to a JSON string

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value to serialize to a JSON string

fields.name: json
fields.description: The serialized JSON string

fields.name: length
fields.description: Length of the JSON string in characters

knownErrors.description: Failed to serialize value to JSON

capabilities.name: filter
capabilities.description: Filter an array based on property values matching or excluding specified values

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The array of items to filter

inputs.name: property_path
inputs.description: The property path to extract from each item (JSONPath syntax). Use "$" or "" to filter the array values directly.

inputs.name: match_values
inputs.description: The value(s) to compare against (single value or array)

inputs.name: match_condition
inputs.description: Whether to include or exclude matching items

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of items that passed the filter

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of items that passed the filter

fields.name: removed_count
fields.description: Number of items removed by the filter

capabilities.name: sort
capabilities.description: Sort an array of items, optionally by a property path

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The array to sort

inputs.name: property_path
inputs.description: The property path to sort by (if omitted, sorts the items directly)

inputs.name: ascending
inputs.description: Whether to sort in ascending order (true) or descending order (false)

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of sorted items

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of items in the sorted array

capabilities.name: map_fields
capabilities.description: Map fields from a source object to a target object using field path mappings

inputs.name: source_data
inputs.description: The source object containing data to map

inputs.name: mappings
inputs.description: Map of source field paths to target field names

fields.name: result
fields.description: Object with mapped field values

fields.name: field_count
fields.description: Number of fields successfully mapped

capabilities.name: group_by
capabilities.description: Group array items by a property key, returning either a map or array of groups

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The array of items to group

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: The property path to use as the grouping key (JSONPath syntax)

inputs.name: as_map
inputs.description: Return grouped items as a map (key -> items) instead of an array of arrays

fields.name: groups
fields.description: Grouped items - either a map (key -> items) or array of arrays

fields.name: group_count
fields.description: Number of unique groups created

knownErrors.description: Failed to serialize group key to string

capabilities.name: append
capabilities.description: Append an item to the end of an array

inputs.name: array
inputs.description: The array to append an item to (can contain objects or primitive values)

inputs.name: item
inputs.description: The item to append to the array (can be an object or primitive value)

fields.name: array
fields.description: Array with the new item appended

fields.name: length
fields.description: New length of the array after appending

capabilities.name: flat_map
capabilities.description: Extract nested arrays from each item by property path and flatten into a single array

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The array of objects to flat map

inputs.name: property_path
inputs.description: The property path to the nested array in each item (JSONPath syntax)

fields.name: items
fields.description: Flattened array of all nested items

fields.name: count
fields.description: Total number of items in the flattened array

capabilities.name: array_length
capabilities.description: Get the length of an array, string, or number of keys in an object

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Array, string, or object to get the length/size of

fields.name: length
fields.description: Length of array/string, or number of keys in object

fields.name: is_array
fields.description: True if the value was an array

capabilities.name: ensure_array
capabilities.description: Ensure a value is an array. Arrays pass through unchanged, null becomes empty array, other values are wrapped in a single-element array.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Value to wrap in an array if not already an array. Arrays pass through unchanged, null becomes empty array.

fields.name: items
fields.description: The input wrapped as an array (or the original array if already an array)

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of items in the resulting array

fields.name: was_array
fields.description: True if the input was already an array, false if it was wrapped

capabilities.name: http_request
capabilities.description: Execute an HTTP request with the specified method, URL, headers, and body. When a connection is configured, credentials are injected server-side by the runtara HTTP proxy; otherwise the request is sent directly to the URL.

inputs.name: method
inputs.description: HTTP verb for the request

inputs.name: url
inputs.description: Full URL to send the request to

inputs.name: headers
inputs.description: Custom HTTP headers

inputs.name: query_parameters
inputs.description: URL query parameters

inputs.name: body
inputs.description: Request payload (any JSON value, or string for non-JSON bodies)

inputs.name: body_type
inputs.description: How to encode the request body

inputs.name: response_type
inputs.description: Expected response format

inputs.name: timeout_ms
inputs.description: Maximum time to wait for response

inputs.name: fail_on_error
inputs.description: If true (default), non-2xx responses will fail the step. If false, non-2xx responses are returned normally.

fields.name: status_code
fields.description: HTTP status code (e.g., 200, 404, 500)

fields.name: headers
fields.description: Response headers as key-value pairs

fields.name: body
fields.description: Response body (JSON object, text string, or {"base64": "..."} for binary depending on response_type)

fields.name: success
fields.description: True if the status code is in the 2xx range

name: Object Model
description: CRUD operations over the runtara object-model API (list schemas, create/query/update/delete instances, bulk operations, aggregates, and conversation memory).

capabilities.name: create_instance
capabilities.description: Create a new instance in an object model schema

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema to create an instance in

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The field values to store in the new instance

output.description: Result of creating an instance in the object model

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: instance_id
fields.description: The ID of the created instance

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: query_instances
capabilities.description: Query instances from an object model schema with optional filters

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema to query

inputs.name: filters
inputs.description: Key-value pairs to filter instances by (simple AND logic)

inputs.name: condition
inputs.description: Advanced filtering condition with operators like Or, And, Eq, IsDefined. Uses same ConditionExpression as Conditional and Filter steps.

inputs.name: score_expression
inputs.description: Optional computed score column passed as an object, not an escaped JSON string. For vector nearest-neighbor search, order by the alias ascending.

inputs.name: order_by
inputs.description: Optional structured ordering. For vector nearest-neighbor search, order by the score expression alias ascending.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of instances to return

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: Number of instances to skip

output.description: Result of querying instances from the object model

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: instances
fields.description: The matching instances

fields.name: total_count
fields.description: Total count of matching instances

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: check_instance_exists
capabilities.description: Check if an instance matching the given filters exists

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema to check

inputs.name: filters
inputs.description: Key-value pairs to match against existing instances

output.description: Result of checking if an instance exists in the object model

fields.name: exists
fields.description: Whether a matching instance exists

fields.name: instance_id
fields.description: The ID of the matching instance (if exists)

fields.name: instance
fields.description: The full instance data (if exists)

capabilities.name: create_if_not_exists
capabilities.description: Create an instance only if no matching instance exists (idempotent insert)

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema

inputs.name: match_filters
inputs.description: Conditions to check if record already exists

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The field values to store in the new instance (if created)

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: created
fields.description: Whether a new instance was created

fields.name: already_existed
fields.description: Whether the instance already existed

fields.name: instance_id
fields.description: The instance ID (whether new or existing)

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: update_instance
capabilities.description: Update an existing instance in an object model schema

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema

inputs.name: instance_id
inputs.description: The ID of the instance to update

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The field values to update in the instance

output.description: Result of updating an instance in the object model

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: instance_id
fields.description: The ID of the updated instance

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: delete_instance
capabilities.description: Delete a single instance from an object model schema

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema

inputs.name: instance_id
inputs.description: The ID of the instance to delete

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: bulk_create_instances
capabilities.description: Insert many instances in a single transaction

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema

inputs.name: instances
inputs.description: Array of property objects, one per record to insert (object form)

inputs.name: columns
inputs.description: Column names for columnar form; paired with `rows`

inputs.name: rows
inputs.description: Rows in columnar form — each inner array has the same length as `columns`

inputs.name: constants
inputs.description: Column values merged into every columnar row as defaults; row cells override on overlap

inputs.name: nullify_empty_strings
inputs.description: When true, "" in non-string columns becomes null before type validation

inputs.name: on_conflict
inputs.description: Conflict handling mode: 'error' (default) aborts, 'skip' silently skips existing rows, 'upsert' updates them

inputs.name: conflict_columns
inputs.description: Columns that uniquely identify a row for conflict detection. Required with on_conflict=skip|upsert

inputs.name: on_error
inputs.description: Validation-failure handling: 'stop' (default) aborts on first failure, 'skip' records the row in errors and continues

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: created_count
fields.description: Number of rows inserted (or updated, in upsert mode)

fields.name: skipped_count
fields.description: Number of rows skipped (validation failure or ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)

fields.name: errors
fields.description: Per-row errors when on_error='skip'

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: bulk_update_instances
capabilities.description: Update many instances in one transaction, by condition or by per-row values

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema

inputs.name: condition
inputs.description: Optional DSL condition; when set, `properties` is applied to every matching row

inputs.name: properties
inputs.description: Property values applied to rows matching `condition`

inputs.name: updates
inputs.description: Per-row updates: list of {id, properties}

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: updated_count
fields.description: Number of rows updated

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: bulk_delete_instances
capabilities.description: Delete many instances in one transaction, by IDs or by condition

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema

inputs.name: ids
inputs.description: List of instance IDs to delete (mutually exclusive with `condition`)

inputs.name: condition
inputs.description: DSL condition to select rows to delete (mutually exclusive with `ids`)

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: deleted_count
fields.description: Number of rows deleted

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: query_aggregate
capabilities.description: Group and aggregate object model instances (COUNT, SUM, MIN, MAX, FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE). Returns a columnar {columns, rows, group_count} result.

inputs.name: schema_name
inputs.description: The name of the object model schema to aggregate over

inputs.name: condition
inputs.description: Optional filter condition (same DSL as Query Instances). Applied before GROUP BY.

inputs.name: group_by
inputs.description: Columns to group by. Empty list → one row over the whole filtered set.

inputs.name: aggregates
inputs.description: Aggregate expressions: [{alias, fn, column?, distinct?, order_by?, expression?}]. fn is one of COUNT, SUM, MIN, MAX, FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE, EXPR.

inputs.name: order_by
inputs.description: Top-level sort — targets group_by columns or aggregate aliases.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.description: Max result rows. Server caps at 100000.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: Pagination offset

output.description: Columnar aggregate result: ordered column names, rows aligned to those columns, and the total number of groups matched.

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: columns
fields.description: Output column names — group_by columns first, then aggregate aliases.

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Result rows, each aligned to the `columns` list.

fields.name: group_count
fields.description: Total number of groups matched by the condition (before limit/offset). 1 when there is no group_by.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: load_memory
capabilities.description: Load conversation memory for an AI agent by conversation ID

inputs.name: conversation_id
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the conversation to load

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: messages
fields.description: Array of conversation messages in rig message format

fields.name: message_count
fields.description: Number of messages in the conversation

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

capabilities.name: save_memory
capabilities.description: Save conversation memory for an AI agent, creating or updating by conversation ID

inputs.name: conversation_id
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the conversation to save

inputs.name: messages
inputs.description: Array of conversation messages in rig message format

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the operation succeeded

fields.name: message_count
fields.description: Number of messages saved

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed

name: Utils
description: Utility operations: random numbers, math, dates, country codes, delays.

capabilities.name: random_double
capabilities.description: Generate a random double between 0 and 1

capabilities.name: random_array
capabilities.description: Generate an array of random integers

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The number of random integers to generate

capabilities.name: return_input_string
capabilities.description: Returns the input string value

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The string value to return as output

capabilities.name: return_input
capabilities.description: Returns the input JSON value

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The JSON value to return as output

capabilities.name: do_nothing
capabilities.description: No-op operation that returns null

capabilities.name: delay_in_ms
capabilities.description: Delays execution for the specified number of milliseconds. For durable delays that survive crashes, use the Delay step type instead.

inputs.name: delay_value
inputs.description: The amount of time to pause execution in milliseconds

capabilities.name: calculate
capabilities.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression with variables

inputs.name: expression
inputs.description: Mathematical expression with variables and operators (+, -, *, /, %, parentheses)

inputs.name: variables
inputs.description: Map of variable names to their numeric values (supports numbers and string numbers)

inputs.name: enable_rounding
inputs.description: Round the result to the specified number of decimal places

inputs.name: decimal_places
inputs.description: Number of decimal places to round to (maximum 15)

capabilities.name: format_date_from_iso
capabilities.description: Format an ISO date to a custom format

inputs.name: iso_date
inputs.description: The date/time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-15T10:30:00Z)

inputs.name: target_format
inputs.description: Format pattern using yyyy, MM, dd, HH, mm, ss tokens

capabilities.name: iso_to_unix_timestamp
capabilities.description: Convert ISO date to Unix timestamp

inputs.name: iso_date
inputs.description: The date/time in ISO 8601 format to convert to Unix timestamp

capabilities.name: get_current_unix_timestamp
capabilities.description: Get the current Unix timestamp

capabilities.name: get_current_iso_datetime
capabilities.description: Get the current date/time in ISO format

capabilities.name: get_current_formatted_datetime
capabilities.description: Get the current date/time in a custom format

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Format pattern using yyyy, MM, dd, HH, mm, ss tokens

capabilities.name: country_name_to_iso_code
capabilities.description: Convert country name to ISO code

inputs.name: country_name
inputs.description: The full country name or commonly used alternative

inputs.name: code_type
inputs.description: The type of ISO code to return (alpha2 or alpha3)
